ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the experiment is conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the experiment has ethics approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this trial belongs to */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., A, B) */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Order number of the trial in the experiment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., image, sound) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus (e.g., color, shape, sound) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stimulus */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the stimulus file (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_stimuli" (
  "trial_stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trial-stimulus association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side where the stimulus is presented (e.g., left, right) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the stimulus is presented in the trial */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stimulus presentation in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "left_rewarded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the left stimulus was rewarded */,
  "right_rewarded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the right stimulus was rewarded */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., monetary, points) */,
  "reward_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "consent" INTEGER /* Indicates if consent was given for participation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "participation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the participant has participated in experiments */,
  "last_participation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation log */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment participated in */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial participated in */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant responding */,
  "response" TEXT /* Participant's response (e.g., left, right) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond in seconds */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant in their response (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
